Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional
Functional helpers for FlixelGDX.

This package contains small functional utilities and interfaces used throughout the engine to keep APIs lightweight and to avoid repeated boilerplate. It is not required for typical game code, but may be useful when integrating FlixelGDX into existing projects.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional.supplier
    Functional suppliers for FlixelGDX.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    FlixelAngleable
    Something with a rotation angle in degrees that angle tweens and motion integration can drive.
    FlixelColorable
    Something with a tint you can read or write as either a libGDX Color or a FlixelColor wrapper.
    FlixelDestroyable
    Interface for Flixel-based objects that can be destroyed.
    FlixelDrawable
    Interface for Flixel-based visible objects that can be drawn.
    FlixelKillable
    Flixel-style kill and revive: a killed object should not run normal updates or draws, but can be revived later without reallocating.
    FlixelPositional
    Spatial and kinematic surface shared by FlixelObject: world position, size, scroll factors, velocity-based motion, and immovable toggling so motion tweens never need to cast to FlixelObject.
    FlixelShakeable
    Something FlixelShakeTween can jitter and restore without caring whether the underlying channel is a sprite graphic offset, a world position, or a desktop window position.
    FlixelUpdatable
    Interface for Flixel-based objects that can be updated.
    FlixelVisible
    Something that can be shown or hidden for drawing.
    IFlixelBasic
    Full FlixelBasic-style contract: per-frame update and draw hooks, existence and active flags, visibility, kill and revive, teardown, and libGDX Disposable / Pool.Poolable hooks.
